sections.paragraph: plur. f. splendid, or costly garments, which at home are put off, Isa 3:22 Zec 3:4 from the root חָלַץ Arab. خلع to put off a garment, Arab. خَلْعَةُ a garment for a special occasion, more splendid, whence is formed a new verb, [or rather a new meaning to the verb], خلع to bestow a garment for an especial occasion, an official dress.
